name: Popcorn Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler. Line a broiler pan with aluminum foil and spray the foil with vegetable cooking spray.
2. In a small bowl, combine mayonnaise, mustard, chopped parsley, lemon juice, and tabasco sauce. Mix well. In another small bowl, combine bread crumbs and dried tarragon. Mix well.
3. Dip each shrimp in the mayonnaise mixture, turning to coat. Dredge each shrimp in the breadcrumb mixture, turning to coat and patting firmly so the crumbs adhere.
4. Place the coated shrimp on the prepared pan. Broil 4 inches from the heat, turning once halfway through cooking, until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
